query: SELECT "loginMethod", COUNT(*) as count, COUNT(CASE WHEN phone IS NULL OR phone = '' THEN 1 END) as no_phone FROM users GROUP BY "loginMethod" ORDER BY count DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ShrASiucEBBHq4.29f4086d1d74 --database REsBLBseSeXTZwj6TLp8WJ --execute SELECT "loginMethod", COUNT(*) as count, COUNT(CASE WHEN phone IS NULL OR phone = '' THEN 1 END) as no_phone FROM users GROUP BY "loginMethod" ORDER BY count DESC;
